name: What results should I expect from Google Assistant optimization?
description: Expect better visibility in voice-style searches, featured snippets, and local results, which can lead to more calls, directions, and inquiries.

mainEntity.name: What results should I expect from Google Assistant optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best outcome is more visibility in voice-style queries, featured snippets, and local search results. For local businesses, that often means more calls, direction requests, and contact form leads from people asking simple questions out loud.
acceptedAnswer.description: Expect better visibility in voice-style searches, featured snippets, and local results, which can lead to more calls, directions, and inquiries.
